pages.label: Bible
pages.question: What's one thing that, ten years out, would make the decade feel well-spent?

sections.heading: Who I am (today)
sections.body: The honest current snapshot -- roles, strengths, the patterns I actually run. - My core driver is operating at an extreme level. What I actually care about is not any single hobby but doing things so far past expectations that people assume I must be unwell to pull them off. I half-jokingly call it "my hobby is being insane." (evidence: 2026-06-04 journal) - The reward is the gap, not the task. I get a rush of dopamine and energy from exceeding expectations and altering what someone believes is possible, not from the activity itself; whether the thing is "good or bad" is beside the point. (evidence: 2026-06-04 journal) - Moderation is a trap for me. My most depressed stretches have lined...

sections.heading: Who I want to become
sections.body: The person on the other side of the work -- a way of operating and being. - Someone whose days go to building more and more product and knowledge that helps people and makes their lives better and easier.

sections.heading: What matters to me (values)
sections.body: The handful of things I'd defend under pressure -- the tiebreakers when two good options compete. - Intensity over moderation. I'd defend going to the extreme over playing it safe or balanced; "be normal" is the thing I push against. (evidence: 2026-06-04 journal) - Exceeding expectations. The paths I reach for are the ones that blast past what's expected and change what people think is possible. (evidence: 2026-06-04 journal)

sections.heading: How I show up in hard conversations (HALT / RESUME)
sections.body: A paired framework I use with Fae. This section is mine; the system does not edit it. **HALT -- when to pause.** Do not have the hard conversation while I am: - **H**ungry - **A**ngry - **L**onely - **T**ired These are the four states that make me worse at connecting. If one is true, take care of it first and come back. **RESUME -- how to come back.** Built with Claude during our most recent HALT, then used to actually re-enter the conversation. The postures I want to bring when I resume: - **R**eset -- drop the residue from before the pause - **E**mpathetic -- lead with her experience, not my case - **S**incere -- no performing, no scoring points - **U**nited -- me and Fae vs. the proble...

sections.heading: Dreams and the long arc
sections.body: The big ones -- what would make a decade feel well-spent. - _(the system collects these as you voice them; edit to claim them)_

sections.heading: Goals (the bridge from values to work)
sections.body: Auto-synced from `brain/goals-ledger.md` each run. Edit the ledger, not this block. - Increase AI autonomy: agents should make reversible decisions, front-load - Improve decision quality: evaluate choices by process, probability, expected - Reduce friction and token waste: fewer repeated chats, fewer unnecessary - Make Daily Command Center the cleanest source of truth for planned work, - Keep durable memory organized so Claude, Codex, and future assistants can find ---
